individual numbers are too unlikely to do much
with how many pulls the game gives out, i am surprised we haven't really seen 3 SSR

like the chances of 3 successes out of 5 trials with a 3.03% success chance per trial is ~0.03% which would be 3333 5-pulls or 17k+ pulls done for an expected chance of it, but given the rates on it you'd probably need like 40-50k+ pulls for a statistically significant conclusion and even then there's always the "okay but what if they really were just in the 2% unluckiest players category"

it is also slightly easier to get 3 ssrs within any group of 5 pulls (which you achieve with 1-pulls) than 3 ssrs within a given 5-pull (which you achieve with 5-pulls) because for the 1-pulls you get more wiggle room by getting to choose any "window" of 5 pulls
